'''chakoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sdrd|sdrd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sdrd|sdrd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chakoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chækeyeth|chækeyeth]] || [[word:chækeyej|chækeyej]] || [[word:chækeyesh|chækeyesh]] || [[word:chækeye|chækeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chakokoyoth|chakokoyoth]] || [[word:chakokoyoj|chakokoyoj]] || [[word:chakokoyosh|chakokoyosh]] || [[word:chakokoyo|chakokoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chakoyoth|chakoyoth]] || [[word:chakoyoj|chakoyoj]] || [[word:chakoyosh|chakoyosh]] || [[word:chakoyo|chakoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chakofyoth|chakofyoth]] || [[word:chakofyoj|chakofyoj]] || [[word:chakofyosh|chakofyosh]] || [[word:chakofyof|chakofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chakoyotho|chakoyotho]] || [[word:chakoyojo|chakoyojo]] || [[word:chakoyosho|chakoyosho]] || [[word:chakoyoko|chakoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chakoyoth|chakoyoth]] || [[word:chakoyoj|chakoyoj]] || [[word:chakoyosh|chakoyosh]] || [[word:chakoyo|chakoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chakoyothol|chakoyothol]] || [[word:chakoyojol|chakoyojol]] || [[word:chakoyoshol|chakoyoshol]] || [[word:chakoyokol|chakoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chakoyothotho|chakoyothotho]] || [[word:chakoyojojo|chakoyojojo]] || [[word:chakoyoshosho|chakoyoshosho]] || [[word:chakoyoko|chakoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chakoyothon|chakoyothon]] || [[word:chakoyojon|chakoyojon]] || [[word:chakoyoshon|chakoyoshon]] || [[word:chakoyokon|chakoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chakoyothoro|chakoyothoro]] || [[word:chakoyojoro|chakoyojoro]] || [[word:chakoyoshoro|chakoyoshoro]] || [[word:chakoyokoro|chakoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
